title: Messaging Frontend Interactions

actors.name: GeneraticAgent
actors.label: GeneraticAgent (Backend)
actors.note: Shared across all frontends; agent.put_task() / agent.abort() / agent.history

use_cases.name: Send Text Message
use_cases.description: User sends a plain text message to the bot; platform receives and dispatches to agent

use_cases.name: Receive Agent Response
use_cases.description: User receives the agent reply sent back by the frontend (text, streaming, or chunked)

delivery_patterns.TgApp: Streaming: _stream(dq, msg) → msg.edit_text() every 3s; final clean + HTML
delivery_patterns.QQApp: AgentChatMixin.run_agent → send_done → send_text via post_c2c_message / post_group_message
delivery_patterns.WeChatApp: on_message._handle() polls dq.get(timeout=300), chunked bot.send_text() up to 6 msgs
delivery_patterns.FsApp: run_agent() polls dq.get_nowait(), update_message(msg_id, display) streaming via card; final send_message

use_cases.name: Stop Running Task
use_cases.description: User sends /stop command to abort the active agent task

impl.shared_mixin: AgentChatMixin.handle_command('/stop') → state['running']=False; agent.abort(); send_text('⏹️ 正在停止...')
impl.WeChatApp: on_message checks text in ('/stop', '/abort') → agent.abort(); bot.send_text('已停止')

use_cases.name: Switch LLM Model
use_cases.description: User sends /llm [n] to list or switch the active language model

impl.WeChatApp: on_message checks text.startswith('/llm') → agent.next_llm(n) or agent.list_llms()

use_cases.name: Clear Conversation Context
use_cases.description: User sends /new to clear shared agent history and start fresh

use_cases.name: Restore Conversation History
use_cases.description: User sends /restore to reload last conversation from log files

use_cases.name: View Agent Status
use_cases.description: User sends /status to check if agent is running and which LLM is active
use_cases.impl: AgentChatMixin.handle_command('/status') / FsApp.handle_command('/status') → reports agent.is_running and agent.get_llm_name()

use_cases.name: View Help
use_cases.description: User sends /help to see available commands

use_cases.name: Send/Receive Files
use_cases.description: User sends a file or receives generated file attachments from agent

impl.WeChatApp_receive: WxBotClient.send_file(to_user_id, file_path) → CDN encrypt + upload + sendmessage
impl.WeChatApp_send: _dl_media(items) → AES decrypt + save to temp dir

use_cases.name: Send Media Messages
use_cases.description: User sends images, audio, or video to the bot for processing

impl.WeChatApp: _dl_media() AES-128-ECB decrypt from CDN; appended to prompt as '[用户发送文件: path]'
impl.FsApp: _build_user_message() handles msg_type in (image, audio, file, media, post); _download_and_save_media()

use_cases.name: Access Control / Authorization
use_cases.description: Each frontend checks if sender is in the allowed users list before processing messages

impl.TgApp: ALLOWED set from tg_allowed_users; uid not in ALLOWED → reply 'no'

use_cases.name: QR Code Login
use_cases.description: WeChat bot authenticates via QR code scan on first launch
use_cases.note: WeChat only; triggered if no stored token

use_cases.name: Receive Welcome Message
use_cases.description: User entering a WeCom chat receives a configured welcome message
use_cases.impl: WeComApp.on_enter_chat(frame) → client.reply_welcome(frame, {text: WELCOME}) if WELCOME configured

use_cases.name: Send Group Message
use_cases.description: Bot sends replies to group chats (where applicable)

key_classes_and_relationships: AgentChatMixin (chatapp_common.py): abstract base — methods: send_text (abstract), send_done, handle_command, run_agent
QQApp extends AgentChatMixin — overrides send_text; adds on_message, start
DingTalkApp extends AgentChatMixin — overrides send_text; adds _get_access_token, _send_batch_message, on_message, start
WeComApp extends AgentChatMixin — overrides send_text; adds on_text, on_enter_chat, on_connected/authenticated/disconnected/error, start
TgApp: standalone (no mixin), uses handle_msg, _stream, cmd_abort, cmd_llm
WeChatApp: standalone (no mixin), uses WxBotClient + on_message function
FsApp: standalone (no mixin), uses handle_message, handle_command, send_message, update_message
WxBotClient (wechatapp.py inline): send_text, send_file, send_typing, get_updates, run_loop, login_qr
All apps depend on: GeneraticAgent (agentmain.py) — agent.put_task(), agent.abort(), agent.history, agent.is_running, agent.next_llm(), agent.list_llms()
shared_utilities_from_chatapp_common: split_text(text, limit) — splits long messages at newlines
build_done_text(raw_text) — combines cleaned reply + file paths
format_restore() — loads latest log file, reconstructs history pairs
ensure_single_instance(port, label) — socket lock per app
redirect_log(script_file, log_name, label, allowed) — redirects stdout/stderr to log
public_access(allowed) — True if empty or contains '*'

platform_sdk_dependencies.WeChatApp: requests + qrcode + pycryptodome (inline WxBotClient, REST polling API)

important_notes: All frontends share one GeneraticAgent instance (global 'agent') — shared context/history across users within each platform process
TgApp uses streaming edit (edit_text every 3s); FsApp uses update_message card streaming; others are fire-and-wait
WeChatApp and QQApp share the same lock port 19528 — cannot run simultaneously on same host
WeChatApp handles media download with AES-128-ECB decryption from CDN (pycryptodome required)
FsApp supports richest message types: text, post, image, audio, file, media, share_chat, share_user, interactive, share_calendar_event, system, merge_forward
Command routing: mixin-based apps (QQ, DingTalk, WeCom) use AgentChatMixin.handle_command; others implement their own
Ping interval: AgentChatMixin sends '⏳ 还在处理中' every 20s during long tasks
